action_items.task: Build a spike/prototype of a new search ranking function (behind a feature flag) to test whether click-throughs improve.
action_items.evidence_quote: I could throw together a spike, like a rough version, just to see if the click-throughs even move. I can have something by Friday.

action_items.evidence_quote: I can send them to you Wednesday end of day.
